title: Box Office 3D: The Filmest of Films
original_title: Box Office 3D - Il film dei film
overview: An Italian parody of the biggest U.S. blockbusters such as "Gladiator, " "Harry Potter", "Fast and Furious" and "The Da Vinci Code".
